benefits.name: Military Retirement Income Tax Subtraction
benefits.description: Military retirement pay is fully exempt from Virginia state income tax. This subtraction is phased in and fully effective as of 2025.
benefits.notes: Fully phased in as of tax year 2025. Applies to federal military retirement only.

benefits.name: Property Tax Exemption (100% P&T Disabled)
benefits.description: Veterans with 100% permanent and total (P&T) service-connected disability rating receive complete exemption from property taxes.
benefits.notes: Exemption applies to principal residence and up to 5 acres of associated land.

benefits.name: Virginia Military Survivors & Dependents Education Program (VMSDEP)
benefits.description: Free tuition at Virginia state colleges and universities for dependents of 90%+ permanently and totally disabled veterans.
benefits.notes: Available to eligible dependents; also covers surviving spouses and children of deceased 90%+ disabled veterans.

benefits.name: Personal Property Tax Exemption (One Vehicle)
benefits.description: Veterans with 100% P&T disability rating are exempt from personal property tax on one vehicle.
benefits.notes: Exemption applies to one motor vehicle only; must be owned and titled in Virginia.

benefits.name: Free Hunting and Fishing License
benefits.description: Veterans with 70% or higher service-connected disability rating receive a free hunting and fishing license.
benefits.notes: Available through Virginia Department of Wildlife Resources.

benefits.name: State Employment Preference
benefits.description: Veterans receive preference points in Virginia state civil service hiring. Disabled veterans receive additional points.
benefits.notes: Additional preference provided to 100% disabled veterans.

benefits.name: Disabled Veteran License Plates
benefits.description: Disabled veterans receive free specialty license plates providing identification and potential parking benefits.
benefits.notes: Blue and white plates for disabled veterans; may provide local parking benefits.

benefits.name: Virginia Values Veterans (V3) Program
benefits.description: State program connecting veterans to participating employers and workforce resources. Provides job training and placement assistance.
benefits.notes: Free workforce development and employer networking for Virginia veterans.
